project_type: React 19 + TypeScript + Vite 8 portfolio website with Tailwind CSS v4
build_system: Vite 8 with @tailwindcss/vite and @vitejs/plugin-react. Manual chunks for three.js.
test_framework: No test framework - validation via TypeScript type-checking and build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to check types. 2. Run npm run build to confirm production build succeeds. 3. Verify vendor-three chunk is eliminated or drastically reduced. 4. Check no new TypeScript errors introduced.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full npm access. Node 22.22.3, npm 11.4.2. No Docker needed.
key_patterns: - Sections in src/sections/, Components in src/components/, Types in src/types/index.ts, i18n in src/locales/ (en.json, id.json, zh.json), Contexts in src/contexts/, Lib utilities in src/lib/. Device capability detection in src/lib/deviceCapability.ts. Preferences context for theme/music/visual effects/performance mode. LazyWebGL already conditionally loads WebGL based on device capability. CustomCursor already skips on low-end devices. Framer Motion for animations, GSAP imported but barely used. Lenis for smooth scroll. lucide-react for icons.
directory_structure: src/ contains App.tsx (main), components/ (UI components), sections/ (page sections), contexts/ (React contexts), data/ (project data), hooks/ (custom hooks), lib/ (utility functions), locales/ (i18n JSON), types/ (TypeScript types), assets/ (images). public/ has favicon and icons SVG.
